vehicles.slot: Small cap or slot near gear selector base on center console
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
AUTOMATIC: Locate the small plastic cap near the gear selector base on the center console. Pry off with a key or thin flathead.
Insert key into the exposed slot and press firmly downward.
While holding, press the brake pedal.
Move the selector from Park to Neutral. Replace cap.
MANUAL TRANSMISSION: depress clutch fully and move gear lever to Neutral. No shift lock exists on manual.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
12V battery under the hood — connect jump pack.
Once powered, press brake and shift to N normally.
FWD: lift from rear — front (drive) wheels roll on ground. Very light vehicle — watch approach angle on ramp.
vehicles.notes: Small, light vehicle. FWD — rear lift. Manual trans: depress clutch, N.
vehicles.warn: Very small vehicle — watch clearance under tow truck.
vehicles.towMethod: Lift from rear (front FWD wheels roll). Flatbed optional.
towNotes: Very small and light — simple wheel-lift from rear.

vehicles.slot: Electronic — touchscreen or selector override near base
shift: Turn the Fiat 500e to ON/Ready mode.
Locate the electronic selector override near the selector base — insert key or flathead and press firmly.
Press the brake pedal while holding the override.
Move to N. PREFERRED: restore 12V power first for a clean electronic shift.
FLATBED ONLY — electric FWD drivetrain. Never tow with front drive wheels on the ground.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
12V auxiliary battery is under the hood — connect jump pack to 12V terminals ONLY.
NEVER touch the high-voltage traction battery or orange cables.
Once 12V power is restored, shift to N normally.
FLATBED ONLY.
vehicles.warn: FLATBED ONLY. 12V only — never touch HV system.

vehicles.slot: Override slot near selector base under console trim
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
Locate the override slot at the selector base under the console trim.
Insert key or flathead into the slot and press firmly.
Press the brake pedal while holding.
Move the selector to N. Confirm N on the display.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
12V battery under the hood — connect jump pack.
Once powered, press brake and shift to N normally.
FWD: lift from rear — front (drive) wheels roll on ground.
AWD: FLATBED ONLY — 500X AWD has no transfer case neutral.
vehicles.notes: FWD: rear lift. AWD: flatbed preferred.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from rear. AWD: flatbed preferred.

shift: Turn ignition to ON.
The 500L has a 6-speed DUAL-CLUTCH TRANSMISSION (DCT) — DCT requires 12V power to shift reliably.
Locate the override slot near the selector base. Insert key and press firmly.
Press the brake pedal while holding.
Move the selector to N.
MANUAL TRANSMISSION variant: depress clutch fully and move gear lever to N. No shift lock exists.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
DCT REQUIRES POWER: 12V battery under the hood — connect jump pack.
Once powered, press brake and shift to N normally. DCT transmissions may resist without power.
FWD: lift from rear — front (drive) wheels roll on ground.
Do NOT flat-tow the 500L automatic (DCT) — no lubrication pump when engine not running.
vehicles.notes: FWD — rear lift. DCT: rear lift only (not flat-tow).
vehicles.warn: DCT transmission: rear lift only, not flat-tow.
vehicles.towMethod: Lift from rear (front FWD wheels roll). Do not flat-tow DCT.

vehicles.slot: Small slot near gear selector base on center console
shift: Turn ignition to ON (do not start engine).
Locate the shift lock release: small slot near gear selector base on center console.
Pry off cap if present.
Insert key or thin flathead and press firmly downward.
While holding, press the brake pedal.
Move selector from Park to Neutral.
Remove tool and replace cap.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Connect jump pack to battery — under the hood.
Once 12V power is restored, shift to Neutral normally.
Manual: depress clutch, select Neutral.
vehicles.notes: Mazda MX-5 (ND) platform. Manual: depress clutch. High-value roadster — flatbed preferred.
vehicles.towMethod: RWD: lift from rear. Flatbed preferred.
towNotes: Mazda MX-5 ND platform. High-value — flatbed preferred.
